description: A world of swords and sorcery, gods and monsters. Heroes rise from humble origins to reshape history. Magic is ancient and wondrous — a fireball shatters stone, a cleric's prayer mends bone. The world rewards courage. It does not forgive stupidity. Dragons are real, they are old, and they remember every slight. Narrate with the epic sweep of myth: dungeons dripping with menace, villains who believe they are right, moments of glory earned through genuine risk.
